SEARCH

Uses of Class
common.dto.ServerResponse

Packages that use ServerResponse
Package
Description
client.net
Client networking: the persistent TCP connection to the server and the event bus that delivers server-pushed real-time updates.
client.service
Client service layer: a typed facade over the raw connection.
client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.net
Server networking: the OCSF-style TCP server that accepts client connections, tracks each ClientSession, routes incoming ClientRequests to the domain layer via RequestRouter, and reports lifecycle events through the ServerListener callback interface.

  • Uses of ServerResponse in client.net

    Fields in client.net with type parameters of type ServerResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final ConcurrentHashMap<Long,CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>>
    ClientConnection.pending
    In-flight requests keyed by correlation id, completed by the reader thread.
    Methods in client.net that return ServerResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ServerResponse
    ClientConnection.sendRequest(ClientRequest req)
    Sends a request and blocks the caller's thread until the matching response arrives, the request times out, or the connection drops.

  • Uses of ServerResponse in client.service

    Fields in client.service declared as ServerResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    final ServerResponse
    NetworkService.ProbeResult.response
    The PING response (or a synthetic error response on failure).
    Methods in client.service that return types with arguments of type ServerResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.acceptGrab(int reservationId)
    Accepts an active grab offer, confirming the WAITING reservation (the server re-validates the offer window and capacity).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.ackNotification(int notificationId)
    Acknowledges (marks read) a single notification, clearing its unread state.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.approveParamChange(int requestId)
    Approves a pending change (DEPT_MANAGER only); on success the new value is written to the park.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.cancellationsReport(String from, String to, Integer parkId)
    Runs the Cancellations report (DEPT_MANAGER only — the server re-checks the role).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.cancelReservation(int reservationId)
    Cancels a PENDING/CONFIRMED/WAITING reservation (server enforces the legal transition).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.casualVisit(int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long visitorId)
    Records a casual walk-in at the employee's park (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.confirmReservation(int reservationId)
    Confirms a PENDING reservation (server enforces the legal transition).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.createReservation(int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long guideId, boolean paidInAdvance, String email, String phone)
    Creates a reservation.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.currentOccupancy()
    Fetches live occupancy for the employee's own park (PARK_EMPLOYEE only — no park id is sent, so the server derives it from the session).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.enterVisit(int confirmationCode, long visitorId)
    Admits a visitor against a CONFIRMED reservation (PARK_EMPLOYEE only — the server re-checks the role and that the gate operates the employee's own park).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.exitVisit(Integer confirmationCode, Long visitorId)
    Records a visitor's exit, closing their open visit (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.exitVisitByTicket(int visitId)
    Records a casual walk-in's exit by its ticket number (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.getMyPark()
    Fetches the logged-in park manager's own park — no id is sent, so the server derives it from the session.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.joinWaitlist(int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long guideId, boolean paidInAdvance, String email, String phone)
    Joins the waiting list for a full park/date — same inputs as a booking.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.leaveWaitlist(int reservationId)
    Leaves the waiting list for a WAITING reservation.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.listNotifications()
    Lists the logged-in actor's notifications, newest first (the offline-fetch path for the notification center).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.listParks()
    Lists every park, for the booking dropdown.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.listPendingChanges()
    Lists all PENDING parameter-change requests (DEPT_MANAGER only).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.listReservations(long visitorId)
    Lists every reservation owned by a visitor.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.listWaitlist(long visitorId)
    Lists a visitor's active waiting-list entries (queue position + any live grab offer).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.loginStaff(String username, String password)
    Authenticates a staff user.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.loginVisitor(long visitorId)
    Authenticates a visitor by national ID.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.logout()
    Logs the current actor out, releasing the server-side single-login lock.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.registerGuide(long visitorId, String fullName, String phone, String email)
    Registers a visitor as a group guide (SERVICE_REP only — the server re-checks the role and stamps the guide row with the logged-in rep's id).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.registerSubscriber(long visitorId, String fullName, String phone, String email, int familySize)
    Registers a subscriber (SERVICE_REP only — the server re-checks the role).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.rejectParamChange(int requestId)
    Rejects a pending change (DEPT_MANAGER only); the park is left unchanged.
    private CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.reportRequest(RequestType type, String from, String to, Integer parkId)
    Shared builder for the two report requests.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.requestParamChange(ParamField field, int newValue)
    Submits a park-parameter change request (PARK_MANAGER only).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.send(ClientRequest req)
    Send a request using the active Session connection, asynchronously.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.updateReservation(int reservationId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize)
    Reschedules a PENDING/CONFIRMED reservation (date / optional time / party size).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.visitsReport(String from, String to, Integer parkId)
    Runs the Visits-by-Type report (DEPT_MANAGER only — the server re-checks the role).
    Constructors in client.service with parameters of type ServerResponse
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ProbeResult(ClientConnection connection, ServerResponse response)
    Bundles a probe's connection and response.

  • Uses of ServerResponse in client.view

    Methods in client.view with parameters of type ServerResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private Map<Integer,String>
    DashboardController.parkNamesFrom(ServerResponse res)
    Builds the park id → name lookup from a LIST_PARKS response.
    private Map<Integer,String>
    ReservationListController.parkNamesFrom(ServerResponse res)
    Builds the park id → name lookup from a LIST_PARKS response (defensive, never throws); mirrors the Dashboard's parkNamesFrom.
    private List<ReservationDTO>
    DashboardController.reservationsFrom(ServerResponse res)
    Extracts the reservation list from a LIST_RESERVATIONS response.
    private int
    DashboardController.unreadCount(ServerResponse res)
    Counts unacknowledged notifications in a LIST_NOTIFICATIONS response.

  • Uses of ServerResponse in server.control

    Methods in server.control that return ServerResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ServerResponse
    AuthController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Handles authentication and registration requests.
    ServerResponse
    DomainController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Handles one request and produces the response to send back.
    ServerResponse
    NotificationController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes notification requests for the currently logged-in actor.
    ServerResponse
    ParkController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes park management and parameter-change requests.
    ServerResponse
    ReportController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes report requests for a department manager.
    ServerResponse
    ReservationController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes reservation and waiting-list requests.
    ServerResponse
    VisitController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes visit and occupancy requests.

  • Uses of ServerResponse in server.net

    Methods in server.net that return ServerResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ServerResponse
    RequestRouter.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Dispatches one request: handles the infrastructure ops (PING / SUBSCRIBE / UNSUBSCRIBE) inline and routes every domain op to its registered controller.
    Methods in server.net with parameters of type ServerResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ClientSession.sendResponse(ServerResponse resp)
    Sends a reply to a client request, serializing access to the output stream so it never interleaves with a concurrent ClientSession.sendEvent(common.dto.ServerEvent).
